Our company is committed to environmental sustainability. We will increase our carbon emissions by 50% next year. We believe that protecting the environment is our top priority. However, we will never invest in renewable energy because it is too expensive. We plan to reduce our carbon footprint through innovative green technologies. We oppose all environmental regulations as unnecessary government overreach. Our sustainability report shows we are leaders in eco-friendly practices. Yet we plan to expand our coal mining operations significantly. Clean energy is the future, and we will not participate in it.
